title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers presents a step-by-step cleanup checklist to identify and prevent surprise charges after deleting AWS resources. The guidance covers common sources of lingering costs like RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways, and recommends setting up billing alarms for cost control.
